top_signals.title: Thunder and Crimson can flash home at season finale
top_signals.summary: HAPPY Valley draws the curtain down for the final time on the 2025/26 season in Hong Kong, when the inner-city track hosts another exciting and competitive nine-race card, starting at 11.30am. Racegoers have plenty to look forward to during the night, with live entertainment from international stars singing on stage, an unforgettable fireworks display, prize [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Progress confirms ShareFile zero-day flaw behind Storage Zone shutdown
top_signals.summary: Progress Software has confirmed that a high-severity zero-day vulnerability is behind the emergency shutdown of ShareFile Storage Zone Controllers last week and has released security updates to patch the flaw. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Consolidated Fund account 2025 to 2026
top_signals.summary: The Consolidated Fund accounts for 2025 to 2026 have been published.

top_signals.title: No need to be a Genius to plunder Valley Treasure
top_signals.summary: THERE is no doubt former top South African handler Brett Crawford has made his mark in Hong Kong since joining the training ranks this season. The 54-year-old, who saddled a host of Group One successes in his home country, recorded his 28th success with PI Legend at Sha Tin last Sunday and can add to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
